title: linum usitatissimum subsp. hispanicum
intro: Linum usitatissimum subsp. hispanicum, also known as the Spanish flax, is a subspecies of the flax plant, characterized by its slender stems and blue or purple flowers. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and promote overall health. The health benefits of Linum usitatissimum subsp. hispanicum include reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or infused in cold water, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
